name: Teardrop the Rikka Fairy
desc:
2 Level 12 monsters
You can also Xyz Summon this card by using your "Teardrop the Rikka Queen" with 2 Plant materials.
This card is unaffected by other card effects except Rikka effects.
You can detach 1 material from this card, then return 1 Plant monster in the Banished Zone/GY/Field to the hand. After that effect resolves, look at your opponent's hand, destroy 2 cards in their hand or their field. This effect is treated as a Quick Effect if you have a Plant monster as material. You can only use this effect once per turn.
If your opponent activates a card or effect: You can detach 1 material from this card; negate that effect, then banish that card. This effect is treated as a Quick Effect if you have a Plant monster as material.
You can detach 2 materials from this card; destroy all cards on your opponent's field. This effect is treated as a Quick Effect if you have a Plant monster as material.
strings: Xyz Summon using "Teardrop the Rikka Queen" with 2 Plant materials
Return 1 Plant to hand, then look at opponent's hand and destroy 2 cards
Negate the activation and banish that card
Destroy all cards on your opponent's field
